/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libmirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/mirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/mirela_interfaces/msg/detail/aruco_transforms__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/mirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/mirela_interfaces/msg/detail/line_info__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/mirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/mirela_interfaces/msg/detail/photo_info__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/ros2_ws/src/mirela-sdk/build/mirela_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmirela_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
